title: A Look At Cipher Digital (CIFR) Valuation After Recent Rebrand And Strong Share Price Momentum
description:
Cipher Digital (CIFR) is drawing fresh attention after rebranding from Cipher Mining Inc. in February 2026, as investors reassess a US$8.99b bitcoin mining and high-performance compute data center business.
See our latest analysis for Cipher Digital.
At a share price of US$21.97, Cipher Digital has seen strong momentum build, with a 30 day share price return of 20.71% and year to date share price return of 35.62%. Its one year total shareholder return is also very large.
